summary: Well‑played show captured on a solid audience recording, though fans still wish for a soundboard source.
review: Reviewers note that this is the best available tape of the concert and praise the performance as well played with pleasant audience‑mic sound. The recording is an audience capture (no soundboard), which listeners find decent but still hope for a proper board mix.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers view the performance positively and consider the audio good for an audience tape, though one reviewer gave no stars and there is a desire for a soundboard source, leading to a solid but not outstanding overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear enough audience recording; praised as the best available tape of this show but lacks the depth and balance of a soundboard mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
